parameters.query:
WITH price_rows AS (
  SELECT w.id AS weapon_id, p.uex_terminal_id, p.buy_price, p.sell_price
  FROM datap4k_weapons_norm w
  JOIN prices p ON p.item_uuid = w.uex_uuid AND p.asset_type = 'item'
  WHERE NULLIF(w.uex_uuid, '') IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT w.id AS weapon_id, p.uex_terminal_id, p.buy_price, p.sell_price
  FROM datap4k_weapons_norm w
  JOIN prices p ON p.item_external_id = w.uex_id AND p.asset_type = 'item'
  WHERE NULLIF(w.uex_uuid, '') IS NULL AND w.uex_id IS NOT NULL
),
sold_at_uex AS (
  SELECT
    pr.weapon_id,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'terminal_source_id',  tt.source_id,
        'terminal_name',       tt.name,
        'terminal_type',       tt.terminal_type,
        'terminal_code',       tt.metadata->>'code',
        'terminal_screenshot', tt.metadata->>'screenshot',
        'is_available_live',   (tt.metadata->>'is_available_live')::boolean,
        'location_name',       COALESCE(
          tt.metadata->>'space_station_name',
          tt.metadata->>'outpost_name',
          tt.metadata->>'city_name'
        ),
        'system_name',         tt.metadata->>'star_system_name',
        'planet_name',         tt.metadata->>'planet_name',
        'moon_name',           tt.metadata->>'moon_name',
        'buy_price',           pr.buy_price,
        'sell_price',          pr.sell_price
      ) ORDER BY tt.name
    ) FILTER (WHERE tt.id IS NOT NULL) AS sold_at
  FROM price_rows pr
  JOIN trade_terminals tt
    ON concat('terminals:', pr.uex_terminal_id::text) = tt.source_id
  GROUP BY pr.weapon_id
),
sold_at_dp4k AS (
  SELECT
    w.id AS weapon_id,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'terminal_source_id',  si.terminal_source_id,
        'terminal_name',       tt.name,
        'terminal_type',       tt.terminal_type,
        'terminal_code',       tt.metadata->>'code',
        'terminal_screenshot', tt.metadata->>'screenshot',
        'is_available_live',   (tt.metadata->>'is_available_live')::boolean,
        'shop',                si.shop,
        'location',            si.location,
        'system_name',         tt.metadata->>'star_system_name',
        'planet_name',         tt.metadata->>'planet_name',
        'moon_name',           tt.metadata->>'moon_name',
        'buy_auec',            si.buy_auec,
        'sell_auec',           si.sell_auec
      ) ORDER BY tt.name
    ) FILTER (WHERE tt.id IS NOT NULL) AS sold_at_dp4k
  FROM datap4k_weapons_norm w
  JOIN datap4k_shop_inventory si
    ON si.item_raw_id = w.raw_id AND si.item_raw_table = 'datap4k_weapons_raw'
  JOIN trade_terminals tt
    ON si.terminal_source_id = tt.source_id
  GROUP BY w.id
),
variant_list AS (
  SELECT
    v.variant_of AS base_id,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'id',        v.id,
        'slug',      v.slug,
        'name',      v.name,
        'class_name',v.class_name,
        'source_id', v.source_id,
        'uex_id',    v.uex_id,
        'uex_uuid',  v.uex_uuid
      ) ORDER BY v.name
    ) AS variants
  FROM datap4k_weapons_norm v
  WHERE v.variant_of IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY v.variant_of
),
base_info AS (
  SELECT
    v.id       AS variant_id,
    b.slug     AS base_slug,
    b.name     AS base_name
  FROM datap4k_weapons_norm v
  JOIN datap4k_weapons_norm b ON b.id = v.variant_of
  WHERE v.variant_of IS NOT NULL
),
crafting_data AS (
  SELECT
    wn.id AS weapon_id,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'family',         cn.family,
        'variant_name',   cn.variant_name,
        'category',       cn.category,
        'craft_time_sec', cn.craft_time_sec,
        'slots',          cn.slots,
        'totals',         cn.totals
      ) ORDER BY cn.category, cn.variant_name
    ) AS crafting
  FROM datap4k_weapons_norm wn
  JOIN datap4k_crafting_norm cn
    ON wn.class_name LIKE lower(replace(cn.family, ' ', '_')) || '%'
   AND cn.category IN ('weapons', 'ammo')
  GROUP BY wn.id
)
INSERT INTO entity_display (
  slug, entity_type, name, manufacturer, category, uex_id,
  is_base_variant, payload, search_vector, built_at
)
SELECT
  w.slug,
  'weapon',
  w.name,
  w.manufacturer,
  w.uex_category_name,
  w.uex_id,
  w.is_base_variant,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'name',                  w.name,
    'class_name',            w.class_name,
    'category',              w.category,
    'subtype',               w.subtype,
    'display_type',          w.display_type,
    'manufacturer',          w.manufacturer,
    'size',                  w.size,
    'mag_capacity',          w.mag_capacity,
    'fire_rate_rpm',         w.fire_rate_rpm,
    'ammo_speed_ms',         w.ammo_speed_ms,
    'ammo_lifetime_s',       w.ammo_lifetime_s,
    'ideal_range_m',         w.ideal_range_m,
    'max_range_m',           w.max_range_m,
    'inventory_scu',         w.inventory_scu,
    'dmg_energy',            w.dmg_energy,
    'dmg_physical',          w.dmg_physical,
    'dmg_thermal',           w.dmg_thermal,
    'dmg_distortion',        w.dmg_distortion,
    'dmg_biochemical',       w.dmg_biochemical,
    'total_damage',          w.total_damage,
    'source_id',             w.source_id,
    'source_slug',           w.source_slug,
    'uex_id',                w.uex_id,
    'uex_uuid',              w.uex_uuid,
    'uex_slug',              el.uex_slug,
    'uex_link_match',        el.match_field,
    'uex_category_id',       w.uex_category_id,
    'uex_category_name',     w.uex_category_name,
    'uex_category_section',  w.uex_category_section,
    'is_base_variant',       w.is_base_variant,
    'variant_of',            w.variant_of,
    'base_slug',             bi.base_slug,
    'base_name',             bi.base_name,
    'variants',              COALESCE(vl.variants, '[]'::jsonb),
    'sold_at',               COALESCE(sau.sold_at,        '[]'::jsonb),
    'sold_at_dp4k',          COALESCE(sadp.sold_at_dp4k,  '[]'::jsonb),
    'crafting',              COALESCE(cd.crafting,         '[]'::jsonb),
    'crossref', CASE WHEN esc.id IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
      'rsi_slug',     esc.rsi_slug,
      'uex_slug',     esc.uex_slug,
      'datap4k_slug', esc.datap4k_slug,
      'source',       esc.source,
      'verified',     esc.verified
    ) ELSE NULL END
  ),
  to_tsvector('english',
    COALESCE(w.name, '')                 || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(w.manufacturer, '')         || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(w.category, '')             || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(w.subtype, '')              || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(w.display_type, '')         || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(w.uex_category_name, '')    || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(w.uex_category_section, '')
  ),
  now()
FROM datap4k_weapons_norm w
LEFT JOIN datap4k_entity_links el ON el.id = w.entity_link_id
LEFT JOIN sold_at_uex sau           ON sau.weapon_id  = w.id
LEFT JOIN sold_at_dp4k sadp         ON sadp.weapon_id = w.id
LEFT JOIN variant_list vl           ON vl.base_id     = w.id
LEFT JOIN base_info bi              ON bi.variant_id  = w.id
LEFT JOIN crafting_data cd          ON cd.weapon_id   = w.id
LEFT JOIN entity_slug_crossref esc  ON esc.entity_type = 'weapon' AND esc.datap4k_slug = w.slug
ON CONFLICT (slug, entity_type) DO UPDATE SET
  name            = EXCLUDED.name,
  manufacturer    = EXCLUDED.manufacturer,
  category        = EXCLUDED.category,
  uex_id          = EXCLUDED.uex_id,
  is_base_variant = EXCLUDED.is_base_variant,
  payload         = EXCLUDED.payload,
  search_vector   = EXCLUDED.search_vector,
  built_at        = now()
